**Question:**
What is the average number of ties for years with more than 19 wins?
Return the final result as JSON in the format {"SQL": "<SQL code>"}.

Resposta_Gerada:
{"SQL": "SELECT COUNTIF Year < 2011 + (TRIMMED[Year] DISTINCT) > 19 
FROM (SELECT 
         Year 
         FROM table) t; 
SELECT AVG(t.Year) FROM t; 
ORDER BY t.Year; 
DROP FROM t; 
LIMIT 1;"}
{"SQL": "SELECT Average(Term) FROM (
    SELECT 
        Year
    WHERE 
        Year > 2011 -- exclude years with only 16 ties
        AND 
        Wins > 19 -- exclude years with only 11 ties
    CROSS JOIN 
    Year
    WHERE 
        Wins > 19
    GROUP 
    BY 
        YEAR(Year) -- using YEAR() function
    END;"
}
{"SQL": "SELECT Average(Year) FROM 
    WHERE 
        WHERE 
        Years FROM (
            SELECT YEAR(Year) AS yr FROM <table>
        ) 
        WHERE 
        Wins > 19;
    GROUP BY 
    END;"}
{"SQL": "SELECT 
    Average(Year) 
    FROM 
    Y E 
    JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            YEAR(Year) AS yr 
        FROM 
        <table>
    ) y 
    ON 
    YEAR(Year) = y.Year;
    GROUP BY 
    END;";}
{"SQL": "SELECT

    FROM
